attributes.action: Instate the Meningitis B Vaccine as a part of the teenage immunisations
attributes.additional_details: Instate the Meningitis B vaccine as a part of the teenage immunisation schedule.
attributes.background: Given the recent outbreak of Meningitis at the University of Kent, we should make the Meningitis B vaccine as a part of the teenage immunisations schedule. Teenagers and University aged young people are the 2nd highest age group at risk for Meningitis B

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Offer MenB vaccine to under 22s born before 2015" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764623
